function.name: submit_work
function.arguments: {"technology_choices":[{"category":"web_framework","choice":"Flask","rationale":"Existing Python Flask API; extend rather than replace"}],"component_boundaries":[{"name":"api","responsibility":"REST API serving JSON endpoints via Flask with unit-test coverage","dependencies":[],"implementation_files":["api/app.py","api/test_goodbye.py"],"capabilities":["goodbye-endpoint"]}],"data_flow":"API clients send GET /goodbye to the Flask API. The API returns a JSON response with a message field. No database or external services are involved.","decisions":[{"id":"ARCH-001","title":"Extend existing Flask app","decision":"Add /goodbye route to existing api/app.py and cover it with api/test_goodbye.py","rationale":"The existing Flask app already exposes /hello, so a parallel route and focused unit tests are the smallest safe change."}],"actors":[{"name":"API Client","type":"system","triggers":["sends HTTP request to /goodbye"]}],"integrations":[{"name":"Flask API","direction":"inbound","protocol":"http"}],"test_surface":{"integration_flows":[{"name":"goodbye-api-flow","components_involved":["api"],"description":"GET /goodbye returns a valid JSON farewell response."}],"e2e_flows":[{"actor":"API Client","steps":["call GET /goodbye"],"success_criteria":["HTTP 200 is returned","response body is JSON with a goodbye message"]}]},"upstream_resolutions":[],"harness_profiles":[]}
